SMALL CLAIM APPEAL CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2015 DISMISSED - UNTIMELY FILING. RESPONDENT SHIRLEY MURRAY APPEARS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPELLANT JACQUELINE DE BUTLER-DRUMMER. NOT REPORTED. THE COURT RULES IMPROPER SERVICE, UNTIMELY FILING AND ORDERS THE APPEAL DISMISSED. THE EARLIER JUDGMENT STANDS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE ELLIOTT MYLES; CLERK M.L.MANZELLA; DEPT. 506.
